title: Add Serilog SQLite sink for agent runtime telemetry
description:
Serilog is now wired for console, rolling file logs, and Windows EventLog in WebUI.Blazor. Added Serilog.Sinks.SQLite package and wired in Program.cs.

Delivered in Sprint 50 Wave D:
- Package added, sink configured in Program.cs with configurable path under logs/
- Existing sinks remain active

Remaining items (Sprint 51+):
- NU1903 suppression REMOVED per audit finding (too broad for greenfield). If NU1903 fires again on transitive SQLite dependency, evaluate per-incident.
- Add startup failure isolation: verify agent boots when DB path is locked/unwritable
- Add retention/rotation policy before telemetry grows unbounded
- Add test for locked/unwritable DB path
- Document troubleshooting queries for common incidents

Acceptance criteria:
- Runtime emits entries to sqlite without crashing when db is locked or unavailable.
- Existing sinks (file + EventLog) remain active.
- At least one troubleshooting query documented for repeated gather loops.
